## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

---

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix — broken glob, incorrect frontmatter, or broken link in docs
- [ ] Documentation update — README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, or CHANGELOG
- [ ] CI improvement — changes to `.github/workflows/validate-mdc.yml`
- [ ] Preview rule fix — correction to `/preview/000-*.mdc` or `/preview/001-*.mdc`

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` in full
- [ ] I am **NOT** modifying the commercial rule logic (files outside `/preview/`)
- [ ] I am **NOT** adding new `.mdc` files outside of `/preview/`
- [ ] All changed `.mdc` files pass the `validate-mdc.yml` CI workflow
- [ ] The PR title is descriptive (not "fix bug" or "update readme")
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if applicable

---

## Related issue

Closes #
